user.title: Kilowahti — Basic settings
user.description: Set up your Kilowahti integration. Region determines which Nordic/Baltic spot-price area is used.

data_description.name: Used in entity names, e.g. 'Home'
data_description.price_resolution: 15 minutes (96 slots/day) or 1 hour (24 slots/day). Match your electricity contract.

vat_and_tax.title: VAT & electricity tax
vat_and_tax.description: Rates pre-filled from your region. Adjust if needed. All prices (transfer tiers, fixed periods) are entered incl. VAT.

data_description.electricity_tax: Flat per-kWh electricity tax added on top of spot/fixed price.

transfer_groups.title: Transfer price groups
transfer_groups.description: Organise transfer price tiers into named groups (e.g. seasonal contract, flat rate). Only one group is active at a time.

transfer_group_detail.title: Manage group
transfer_group_detail.description: Add or remove tiers, or set this group as active.

add_transfer_tier.title: Add transfer price tier
add_transfer_tier.description: Tiers are evaluated in priority order; first match wins. Add a catch-all tier with broad criteria as the last priority.

data_description.max_price: Price at or below this triggers price_acceptable binary sensor.
data_description.price_threshold_includes_transfer: ON: compare total price (spot + transfer + tax). OFF: compare energy price only (spot + tax).
data_description.max_rank: Rank at or below this triggers rank_acceptable binary sensor.
data_description.forward_avg_hours: Number of hours ahead to average for next_hours_avg sensor.
data_description.control_factor_function: Shape of the 0–1 control factor curve.
data_description.control_factor_scaling: Exponent applied to control factor (amplifies extremes).

score_profiles.title: Optimization score profiles
score_profiles.description: Score profiles measure how well your consumption is shifted to cheap hours. The default 'Total' profile is pre-created.

sensor_display.title: Sensor display
sensor_display.description: Configure how sensor values are displayed in Home Assistant.

data.expose_price_arrays: Expose price arrays as sensor attributes (increases DB size)
data.high_precision: High precision mode (5 decimals instead of 2)

data_description.expose_price_arrays: Writes today_prices and tomorrow_prices arrays to the spot_price sensor attribute. Useful for dashboard graphs but adds DB load.
data_description.high_precision: When off (default), price sensors display 2 decimal places. When on, 5 decimal places are shown. Attributes always use full precision.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to spot-hinta.fi. Check your network.
error.invalid_region: The selected region returned no data from the API.
error.tier_hour_range: Hour end must be greater than hour start.
error.period_invalid_dates: End date must be on or after start date.
error.period_overlap: This period overlaps with an existing fixed-price period.
error.period_price_zero: Price must be greater than zero.

data.expose_price_arrays: Expose price arrays as sensor attributes (increases DB size)
data.high_precision: High precision mode (5 decimals instead of 2)

fixed_periods.title: Fixed-price periods
fixed_periods.description: Manage fixed-price contract periods. When active, effective_price reflects the fixed price instead of spot.

data_description.price: Enter price incl. VAT (gross). This price is used as-is — no VAT applied.

error.tier_hour_range: Hour end must be greater than hour start.
error.period_invalid_dates: End date must be on or after start date.
error.period_overlap: This period overlaps with an existing fixed-price period.
error.period_price_zero: Price must be greater than zero.
